title: UAKS Source Object
description: Immutable registration metadata for raw sources entering the UAKS pipeline. Each source receives this schema before any refinement occurs. Derived from UAKS v1 Architecture Specification section 10.1.

sourceId.description: Unique identifier for this source object. Content-addressed or ULID-based.

origin.description: Human-readable origin descriptor. Filesystem path, URL, platform name, or manual label.

ingestedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this source was registered in the system.

checksum.description: SHA-256 hash of the raw source content. Used for deduplication and integrity verification.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the source content.

authorRef.description: Optional reference to an entity ID representing the author or originator.

rightsClass.description: Classification of rights or access constraints on this source.

rawArchiveRef.description: Reference to the immutable copy in the raw source archive (CAS address or archive path).

metadata.description: Additional source-specific metadata. Structure varies by sourceType.
